notes: Relative paths resolve from the config file location. The orchestrator reads local OpenClaw docs from docsPath and may read a local OpenAI Cookbook mirror from cookbookPath. sync_docs_sources.sh now defaults to a curated text-and-clues cookbook sync; use --mode=full only when you intentionally want the broader upstream mirror with notebooks and media. LLM settings for reddit-helper: openaiModel (gpt-4), openaiMaxTokens (300), openaiTemperature (0.7). Digest delivery is optional and usually supplied through environment-specific config. Nightly batch runs at 11pm UTC; morning notification runs at 6am UTC. The retired public proof/openclawdbot delivery lane has been removed from the local runtime.
